summary: Reframed the opening through Gabe and the kitchen so the chapter does not repeat the adjacent dawn-entry scaffold, while preserving the immediate post-Warehouse Nine carryover. Tightened the closing handoff so the move into Blue Hour before dawn lands more directly.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph sequence to begin with Gabe at the stove and the apartment interior, while keeping Mira's little sleep, Warehouse Nine residue, and the tram beat.
Adjusted the final sentence to point explicitly toward Blue Hour before dawn, strengthening the transition into Chapter 11.
